title: glycine corallina
intro: Glycine corallina, also known as licorice root or licorice extract, is a type of plant that belongs to the Glycyrrhiza genus, which is a legume native to Asia and Europe. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its rich content of glycyrrhizin, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. The health benefits of glycine corallina include reducing inflammation and stress, alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and supporting digestive health. Glycine corallina can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or extract, and is often used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese and Ayurvedic practices.
